_comment: Audio test fixtures for MedJournee pipeline testing
_instructions: Add your audio files to tests/audio_fixtures/ and register them here

english_medical_sample.description: English voice sample for transcription accuracy testing
english_medical_sample.expected_transcript: I am speaking clearly so my voice can be recognized. Quick yellow zebras quietly walk by the ocean. Unique voices echo across wide, warm valleys. I enjoy reading, writing, music, and everyday conversations. This is my natural speaking voice.

vietnamese_basic_sample.description: Vietnamese speech sample for language detection

mixed_language_conversation.description: English and Vietnamese mixed conversation for diarization

silence_test.description: Silent audio - should return empty transcription

hallucination_prone.description: Quiet/noisy audio that often triggers hallucinations
